why_levels_1_to_5.L1_observation: 8669 blocked rows; 432 exit_attribution rows; 53 bar symbols in artifacts (post-fetch).
why_levels_1_to_5.L2_counterfactual: Variant A/B/C formulas in BLOCKED_WHY_BARS_COVERAGE.json; full per-row in BLOCKED_COUNTERFACTUAL_PNL_FULL.json.
why_levels_1_to_5.L3_comparison: BLOCKED_GATE_SCORECARD.json aggregates expectancy/win_rate/tail p05/opportunity_cost/loss_prevented by block_reason.
why_levels_1_to_5.L4_recognition: BW n=4865 positive pnl_60m Variant A; AL n=195 negative realized pnl; top BW reason displacement_blocked (see BLOCKED_WHY_DIAGNOSIS.json).
why_levels_1_to_5.L5_root_cause_taxonomy: OVERRIDE_CONFLICT per displacement policy path in main.py ~9529–9574.

horizon_justification: Largest horizon in spec; stabilizes microstructure noise vs 1m/5m (documented tradeoff).
taxonomy_evidence: `displacement_blocked` rows are emitted when `evaluate_displacement` returns `policy_allowed=False` and override branches do not fire (`main.py` ~9509–9574).
Those rows still carry high `score` and full `components` at decision time (`log_blocked_trade` record `main.py` ~1102–1141).
BW cohort n=4865 have positive 60m Variant-A counterfactual while blocked — displacement capacity policy excludes entries that would have been profitable ex-post under the bar model.
Executed losers n=195 (exit_attribution.pnl<0) top reasons are `signal_decay(*)` strings — distinct post-entry path.
primary_recognition_failure_line: OVERRIDE_CONFLICT: displacement gate blocks challengers with strong composite scores when incumbent policy denies swap, evidenced by `main.py` displacement block path (~9529–9574), `BLOCKED_GATE_SCORECARD.json` (displacement_blocked n=5705), and `BLOCKED_COUNTERFACTUAL_PNL_FULL.json` (BW n=4865 at +60m).
primary_recognition_failure_hard_gate_li: Primary recognition failure is OVERRIDE_CONFLICT: displacement capacity policy denies policy_allowed so challengers are blocked while minute-bar counterfactuals show positive 60m Variant-A PnL for 3256/5705 covered displacement_blocked rows, evidenced by BLOCKED_WHY_DIAGNOSIS.json, BLOCKED_GATE_SCORECARD.json, PAPER_EXPERIMENT_RESULTS.json, and main.py lines 9529-9574.
